docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIBASIC, EDIN $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $137.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,337.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,681.00 FILED BY CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIBASIC, EDIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $137.50 SERVED FEB-13-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALIBASIC, EDIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE (JUSTIN HOLMES) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDIN ALIBASIC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUSTIN HOLMES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
